title: Python GUI for Sensor Visualization
desc: A Tkinter/PyQt-based GUI for real-time sensor data visualization, FFT analysis, and signal ranking.

title: FFT and Ranking Analysis Tools
desc: Command-line and GUI tools for frequency-domain analysis of sensor signals with automated ranking and report generation.

title: ROS2 Robot Control Panels
desc: Tkinter-based control panels for ROS2 robot arm visualization, joint control, and trajectory preview.

title: YOLOv8 Detection GUI
desc: A PyQt-based GUI application for YOLOv8 model inference on images, videos, and live camera feeds.

title: Data Logging and Report Generation Tools
desc: Python utilities for structured data logging, experiment tracking, and automated report generation.
